action_contract: Vasopressor recorded intensity only; binary versus preregistered train-quantile three-bin encoding is selected on validation and never on sealed test.
anchor_contract: Earliest completed four-hour evidence time when time-stamped suspected infection and a reviewed SOFA increase of at least two are jointly established; no ICD or medication-only fallback.
claim_boundary: Recorded-trajectory forecasting and benchmark-validity auditing only. Treatment, causal, counterfactual, policy-selection, clinical-utility, deployment, and autonomous-decision claims are blocked.
state_interval: Fully contained pre-action four-hour history bins ending before t.
target_interval: Observed physiology values, masks, and recencies in [t+4h,t+8h).
